rationale: All AC items verified in result_rev. IMPACT_MATRIX_OPERATIONS extended to 5 ops; proposed-policy state declared adjacent to active state; loadImpactMatrix builds proposed matrix from same requests array (AC3 tuple parity holds) and resets to []/null when no schemaDraft (AC4); api.ts accepts policyOverride; verification.md attests typecheck/lint/e2e all green.

findings.summary: This attempt's diff only contains .ddx execution metadata; the code changes were carried in the worktree from prior attempts and are now verifiable in HEAD with a recorded verification.md.
proposedImpactMatrix / proposedImpactMatrixError / loadingProposedImpactMatrix declared adjacent to active matrix state (AC2).
proposedImpactMatrix is built by mapping the same `requests` array used for impactMatrix, guaranteeing identical (subjectId, entityId, operation) tuples and length parity (AC3).
When schemaDraft is null, proposedImpactMatrix = [] and proposedImpactMatrixError = null (AC4).
fetchEffectivePolicy and explainPolicyDetailed accept and forward policyOverride to GraphQL.
